text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building (Two-Pass) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: Empty personas; below source minimum; single pass; no reviewers; missing open_questions.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
